long_description:
[SDN]-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://w3.ibm.com/services/lighthouse/wikis/view/a18a9d34-1b59-405b-b480-c973100f188d/bba0283a-6254-444f-bdf7-8632e1294e1d
TIP Situation: Observed service-error-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted issue in fabcon
TIP Short Description: [SDN] The average value of the default route deleted taken over a minute is positive in in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01/che2-qz1-sr2-rk093-s32
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-sdn:in-che::in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01::che2-qz1-sr2-rk093-s32

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max by (host_hostname,agent_tag_cluster,agent_tag_crn_location)(avg_over_time(fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted[1m])) > 0 = 0.75
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'in-che' and host_hostname = 'che2-qz1-sr2-rk093-s32'

Time:             12/04/2025 07:22 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38515818%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [SDN]-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted
Description:  The alert is generated when default route in fabcon got removed due to FRR restart or connection between TOR is broken, and the routes are not learnt for more than 1 minute
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   max by (host_hostname,agent_tag_cluster,agent_tag_crn_location)(avg_over_time(fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted[1m])) > 0
Duration: 1 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D574612
